title: Ryazan, Ryazan Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ryazan, Ryazan Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ryazan is a city in Ryazan Oblast with a population of 540,000. A historic city southeast of Moscow, known for its magnificent Kremlin, the Ryazan Museum of Long-Range Aviation, and traditional crafts.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
